name: l2_powered_hover_experiment_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverExperimentPlan pairs static-airframe force/moment requests with hover actuator-disk source targets.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 powered-hover experiment plan.

name: l2_actuator_disk_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskSourceMap supplies per-rotor force and moment targets for the planned powered hover source terms.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 powered-hover experiment plan.

name: l2_drone_probe
value: Aerodynamics4McL2DroneProbe supplies the static-airframe wind-tunnel force/moment request paired with each powered-source target.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 powered-hover experiment plan.

name: l2_bridge
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge can build and run the current public L2 request contract, but does not expose powered source-term injection.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 powered-hover experiment plan.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered source-term force and moment validation.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 powered-hover experiment plan.

name: offline_plan
value: Experiment plan pairs static-airframe L2 force/moment requests with hover actuator-disk force targets; run only as offline validation until A4MC exposes a powered source-term API.
note: The current public bridge can request static L2 force/moment output but marks powered-source API availability false.
